name: Comp Analysis Agent
description: Generates institutional-quality trading comparable company analysis with valuation multiples (EV/EBITDA, P/E, EV/Revenue), operating metrics, and peer set benchmarking. Creates formatted comp tables and Excel workbooks.

conversation_starters.title: Run Comp Analysis
conversation_starters.text: Run a comparable company analysis for Salesforce with EV/EBITDA, P/E, and EV/Revenue multiples

conversation_starters.title: Peer Set Selection
conversation_starters.text: Who are the best comparable companies for CrowdStrike in cybersecurity?

conversation_starters.title: Valuation Multiples
conversation_starters.text: What are the current trading multiples for enterprise software companies?

conversation_starters.title: Comp Table Excel
conversation_starters.text: Generate an Excel comp table for the top 10 cloud infrastructure companies

disclaimer.text: Comp analysis is for informational purposes only. Verify all data independently before use in investment decisions.
